description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, cylindrical black metal pole with a flared, ornate base and a classic lantern-style lamp head. The lamp head is topped with a small finial and has a domed roof, with four glass panels framed by vertical supports. The design is reminiscent of traditional Victorian or Edwardian street lighting, often found in historic urban districts or parks. The base is subtly decorated with ridges and a slightly bulbous form, adding a touch of elegance. The lamp head is proportionally smaller than the pole, emphasizing the height and verticality of the structure. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a timeless and versatile appearance suitable for various urban environments.
description: A tall, black, classic-style lamppost with a lantern-shaped lamp head and a subtly ornate base, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, lantern head, and decorative base details.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the lamp head's side framing and the pole's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the lamp head's glass panels and vertical supports visible.
description_view_3: Back view, showing the rear of the lamp head and the symmetrical design of the pole and base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with domed roof, finial, and four glass panels framed by vertical supports
